title: I trust that perfect timing is on my side
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for building a steady relationship with waiting without panic.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 48 of the MONEY program. For when the gap between an opportunity arriving and the right moment to move on it feels like a threat rather than a fact.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 48 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 48 of the MONEY program. The line reframes the wait from a threat (something might be missed) to a fact (the right moment is on its way).
I trust that perfect timing is on my side. Nothing meant for me can be missed. I move with confidence when I get the signal.
Say it three times. The middle line is the one that tends to land hardest, stay with it on the second pass.
Adapted from Day 48 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
